title: Crazy First Date
text: so back in November of 2023 I had started talking to this girl and pretty much the rest of that week and throughout most of December we were talking every day we started calling and we really started to connect you know what I'm saying and I don't want to get like super corny right after bat in this video cuz I'm on YouTube and everything but we are like literally the same person like the amount of times me and her would text each other the same thing or say the same thing at the exact same time or be thinking the same thing during the call or anything was crazy like I would be thinking the exact same thing she would be thinking like it just crazy we would just be able to relate to each other about a lot of different things I never thought i' would be able to relate to somebody with like we literally related over Splatoon and using rollers in the game like so after getting the biggest crush on this girl in less than like a week of knowing her I was like yeah I got to see her we just got to hang out together so in December during winter break I was like planning to go see her right now see here's the fun part I haven't mentioned yet she lives 3 and 1/2 hours away from me so this is why I hadn't seen her at any point since we had started talking even though I wanted to see her so badly so I was literally waiting till winter break to come so I can go see her so near the end into the first week of our winter break we planned a date in time that I would go see her and basically I would have to leave my house around 8: to get to her like 11 something and now here's another problem I'm kind of sort of ran into during this whole situation that was happening I had to get around my mom because another funny thing I had to mentioned at the time I haven't even told my mom the existence of her yet and I didn't know how to especially at this point to be like Mom can I drive like 3 hours away to go see this girl I meant like a month ago over Instagram like no my mom would have said no immediately and be like you're crazy what are you talking about 3 hours away Instagram it was a whole a whole just you know a bunch of woop and I wasn't going for it and I'm stubborn so I felt like I literally could not go another day

title: Crazy First Date
text: id no immediately and be like you're crazy what are you talking about 3 hours away Instagram it was a whole a whole just you know a bunch of woop and I wasn't going for it and I'm stubborn so I felt like I literally could not go another day without seeing this woman IRL so I made the plan basically I would tell my mom I was going to hang out with my friends and I named off two of my friends right so she she knows them she knows the people so she think I'll be off with them and I was like yeah I'll go hang out with my friends all day so that give me a cover while I go see my girl now this plan wasn't foolproof obviously I'm going to tell you that right now cuz me and my girl were planning going ice skating getting food and going to see lights it was a whole day thing and I obviously there's no way I was going to get away with it for that long but yeah you know we had all these fun activities planned and I was like okay we can do all that and I can get home back around like 11:00 p.m. if I leave there at 8:00 and Bam everything goes amazingly perfect and my mom never finds out right so I woke up extra early that day and then got ready like I was about to go see the prettiest girl Al because I was for real and then I also had like a present for her cuz it was Christmas time it was these Lego flowers she wanted and I wrapped it up and everything and then I had another problem R to how was I going to sneak downstairs and put this in my car with my mom noticed so I dead ass went downstairs halfway ready did the whole cartoon tiptoe through the kitchen to go put my gift up and Mom saw me and she thought this for my sister so I put it up and I was chilling so I tiptoed back up the stairs finished getting ready and everything you know I'm saying how to look good for my future Bay and I was nervous bro and I was stalling a little bit coming down the stairs all slow and everything cuz I hav't even told informed my mom yet that I wanted to go hang out my friends and all that stuff plus it was like 7 in the morning so I went downstairs and asked my mom if I can go get breakfast with my friends and then probably go to the mall later all cap obviously she said yes so I quickly got upstairs finished fully getting ready got in the v and started on my journey now I left around like 8 something and it would take me 3 hours and like 45 minutes plus traffic to get there so after jamming out to music and being geeked pretty much the whole time cuz I was

title: Crazy First Date
text: g ready got in the v and started on my journey now I left around like 8 something and it would take me 3 hours and like 45 minutes plus traffic to get there so after jamming out to music and being geeked pretty much the whole time cuz I was about to see my girl I finally made it to her City and this was honestly the furthest Drive I've ever done in my entire life this was the first time I drove really far like I literally drove on like the inter state for like 3 hours I was I don't know what I was doing but I was doing it you feel me but yeah once I got to her City like out of L Lally nowhere this entire like wave of nervousness started to hit me and like anxiety and I was just like bro I'm really here doing this I'm really here and I'm really about to see my girl like this is crazy so I got on the street that led down to her neighborhood and I started driving like slow as hell I mean probably the slowest I've driven the entire time since I left my house that morning and I was just scared bro like I I don't know I was scared like and I I was just driving slow and everything but it didn't really matter cuz next thing you know I was pulling up to our house and I parked my car and I just sat there for a minute and I had like already texted my girl saying that I was there but I was like just you know sitting in the car taking a moment to like collect myself had to like I don't know probably should have meditated or something I don't know I was just trying to get more of the nervousness out of me and be like let's let's be cool you know what I'm saying but you know basically I got out of the car and slowly and nervously walked up to her front door and I rang the doorbell and waited for about 3 seconds cuz then she threw the door open and I saw her angel your and literally the first thing she said to me was you're real I was just standing her like in shock cuz like she was just as pretty in real life as she was over the phone and then we hugged and God she smells so good anyway I went inside met her mom and her mom's great I love her mom and I gave my girl her gift which she loved and she gave me gifts that she got for me which I loved then we ended up watching this Netflix show on our couch that we were both watching at the time and I was still like very nervous I mean like I was I was I was shaking bro so when we got to the couch I did sat there like this and then a little bit later she end up putting her legs on top of mine I almost died

title: Crazy First Date
text: both watching at the time and I was still like very nervous I mean like I was I was I was shaking bro so when we got to the couch I did sat there like this and then a little bit later she end up putting her legs on top of mine I almost died when that happened for some reason and and eventually I got less nervous and more relaxed and comfortable and we started just kind of like cuddling a little bit on the couch chilling for a few hours and watched the show and yep watch the show you know what I'm saying that's all that's all happened and then like around 12:30 we uh left to go ice skating and I was excited but also scared as hell cuz I had an ice skat since I was like 10 so I knew this was going to be a struggle for me so when we got to the ice skating place we got inside we got our skates and everything after we put them on I tried to stand up upright not like on the carpet on the floor we were standing on and then this this is where the realization hit that this is going to going to be real fun cuz I could barely balance on the carpet so imagine how this was going to be on actual ice so I held my girl's hand like a little kid while she let us to the rink and once we got in there I took like one step onto the rink and almost died I I felt both my feet almost slip almost at the splits and everything and then she just casually got into the ice and gracefully skated on I was like bro so at first I had to hold on to the railing along the side like waddle along the side of it while I got used to ice skating and my girl was just casually skating around perfectly around me and everything looking all good and stuff and then eventually I gained enough confidence to go skate on my own and when I said by myself I mean holding my girl's hand tightly cuz I was scared I would fall the second I let go and she made sure I didn't fall cuz like every 5 minutes I would lose my balance start going crazy my feet slipping around like a cartoon and she would catch me literally every time and I look at her like this when she did but yeah literally was having the time of my life ice skating with my girl like a little kid when I was there with her we end up just skating around together and everything was great you know what I'm saying besides the fact no I don't think she wants me to tell you guys this but like when we were skating little kids were out there right they' be falling and getting hurt and she would dad laugh at them like she might deny it but I was

title: Crazy First Date
text: 'm saying besides the fact no I don't think she wants me to tell you guys this but like when we were skating little kids were out there right they' be falling and getting hurt and she would dad laugh at them like she might deny it but I was there you know what I'm saying I watched didn't laugh either I was had I had a straight face I felt bad but she was laughing at little kids falling over guys and then sometimes her her even knowing that I I was still getting used to ice skate I could fall any moment and break both my legs and die she would just go let go of my hand and leave me I'd be like no and I just stand there awkwardly cuz I knew if I took another step I would be on my ass in 3 seconds but she did always come back to come hold my hand again so we chilling and while having all this fun my phone started bu and I checked it it was my mom and I was like okay uh it's probably just you know her checking on me like where where I was and everything I was like okay let me just take this and everything be good so I told my girl that my mom was calling and to hold up and then I answered very nervously and she was asking where I was I was like oh I'm at the uh mall with my friends and she says okay and told me to be home soon and then we hung up and I was like okay w got past that little little hiccup you know what I'm saying and then I caught up to my girl and I thought everything was amazing and fine I thought we're about to go the rest of this day my plane was going to work right 10 minutes pass some more ice skating fun with ba and then my phone starts ringing again and I was like okay why's my phone ringing again I checked it it was my mom I was like oh no what second call this this can't be good and I answered and she goes whole tone changed from a couple minutes ago she goes wherever you are come home right now [Music]
